name: QA 580
description:
PCP QA Test No. 580

Compare pmGetInDom and pmNameIndom for instance names containing spaces



Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform debian11 reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 580.out.bad)
7c7
< pm*InDom: inst=[1] iname=<ONE init> reverse lookup: inst=[1]
---
> pm*InDom: inst=[1] iname=<ONE /bin/systemd> reverse lookup: inst=[1]
9c9
<    [1] <ONE init>
---
>    [1] <ONE /bin/systemd>

PMDA probe: pminfo -h 5aea1a73a825 -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 5aea1a73a825 -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 5aea1a73a825 -f simple.numfetch
